rendering_standard: SVG inline, viewBox 600x500 minimum for coordinate planes, aria-label required, answer NEVER encoded in visual

visual_generators.description: Number line from −15 to 15 showing an absolute value equation or inequality graphically; solution points shown as open/closed circles
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Solution region NOT shaded in question — only shown as answer verification display

visual_generators.description: Number line showing inequality solution set; open circle for strict, closed for non-strict; arrow for unbounded; bracket notation for compound
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Number line shown WITHOUT the inequality symbol — Mathlete writes the matching inequality

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane with labeled axes; one linear function graphed; Mathlete reads slope and intercept to write the equation
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Equation NOT labeled. Two points may be marked with coordinates to assist reading

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane showing either a horizontal or vertical line; Mathlete identifies the equation
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Line drawn without equation label — MC asks to identify correct equation

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane showing a curve or set of points; Mathlete applies vertical line test to determine if it represents a function
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: No vertical line test indicator drawn — Mathlete determines and justifies

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane with a line drawn; two points highlighted; Mathlete computes slope from graph
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Rise/run NOT annotated — Mathlete reads coordinates and computes

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane showing two lines; Mathlete identifies relationship (parallel, perpendicular, or neither) from their equations or graph
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Relationship label NOT shown — Mathlete identifies from slopes

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane with boundary line (solid or dashed) and shaded half-plane; Mathlete identifies the inequality
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Inequality symbol NOT shown on graph — Mathlete writes the inequality from visual

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane with two linear equations graphed; solution type shown through line positions (intersecting, parallel, or coincident)
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Intersection point coordinates NOT labeled — Mathlete reads from grid for one-solution case

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane showing two shaded half-planes; overlapping feasible region highlighted; Mathlete identifies which point satisfies the system

svg_params.test_points_marked: 4 points including one in feasible region

visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Feasible region shaded, but no point labeled as 'solution' — Mathlete identifies from MC

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane showing an exponential curve y = a·bˣ; y-intercept labeled; asymptote shown as dashed horizontal line
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Equation NOT shown — Mathlete identifies growth vs decay and writes equation from a and initial point

visual_generators.description: HTML table with 4 rows of (x, y) values showing constant multiplicative ratio; Mathlete identifies the ratio and writes y = a·bˣ

svg_params.y_values: generated from a and b params

visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Ratio NOT highlighted in table — Mathlete computes consecutive ratios to identify b

visual_generators.description: Side-by-side tables for two different function types; difference rows shown to help identify constant differences vs constant ratios vs constant second differences
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Difference/ratio row NOT pre-computed — Mathlete must compute and identify

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane with a parabola graphed; vertex, axis of symmetry, and x-intercepts (zeros) marked but NOT labeled — Mathlete reads and identifies

svg_params.x_intercepts: marked as small circles on x-axis
svg_params.y_intercept: marked as small circle on y-axis

visual_generators.format_hint_rule: CRITICAL: NO labels on vertex, intercepts, or axis of symmetry — Mathlete reads from grid and identifies

visual_generators.description: Contextual parabola graph (e.g., projectile height vs time) with real-world axis labels; vertex and intercepts marked; Mathlete interprets meaning in context
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Graph labeled but interpretation NOT provided — Mathlete writes meaning of vertex and intercepts in context

visual_generators.description: Scatter plot with labeled axes; shows one of: strong positive, strong negative, moderate, no association; possible outlier included
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: r-value NOT shown — Mathlete describes direction and strength from visual

visual_generators.description: Scatter plot with line of best fit drawn; equation may or may not be shown; Mathlete reads slope/intercept or makes predictions
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: For prediction tasks, equation NOT shown — Mathlete reads from line; for interpretation tasks, equation shown but meaning NOT annotated

visual_generators.description: Scatter plot with regression line; one specific data point is highlighted; vertical residual segment drawn from point to line — Mathlete computes and interprets

svg_params.highlighted_point: one data point with coordinates shown
svg_params.residual_segment: vertical line from point to regression line

visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Residual segment drawn but NOT labeled with value — Mathlete computes actual − predicted

visual_generators.description: Two side-by-side horizontal box plots on the same axis; Mathlete compares medians, IQRs, and identifies which has greater spread or which is skewed
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Individual statistics NOT labeled — Mathlete reads from axis position

visual_generators.description: Histogram with labeled x-axis (bins) and y-axis (frequency); Mathlete identifies shape (symmetric, left-skewed, right-skewed, uniform)
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Shape label NOT provided — Mathlete identifies from bar heights

visual_generators.description: Contextual scenario described in words with a coordinate graph showing the relationship; axes labeled with real-world units; Mathlete writes the linear function
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Equation NOT provided — Mathlete computes slope from context and writes equation

visual_generators.description: Two linear functions shown in different representations (one as equation, one as table or graph); Mathlete compares slopes and intercepts
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: No direct comparison annotation — Mathlete extracts and compares from both representations

visual_generators.description: Number line showing two solution candidates for |ax + b| = c; one or both circled; Mathlete verifies which are valid solutions by substitution
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Both candidates shown — Mathlete verifies by substitution to identify valid solution(s)

visual_generators.description: Scatter plot with quadratic shape; table of values alongside; Mathlete identifies that a quadratic model fits and writes the equation
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Equation NOT shown on graph or table — Mathlete uses table and graph to build model
